name: rl-policy-runner
description: Run a trained RL locomotion policy on a Unitree Go2 over Unitree DDS, with an independent safety watchdog, an ENABLE gate, and a start/stop/E-STOP web UI. Ships wired for the pre-trained Walk-These-Ways (WTW) Go2 gait policy (bundled in the image) so it's runnable out of the box; edit runner/controller.py to target a different policy.

variables.name: WEB_PORT
variables.description: Port for the runner dashboard (start/stop/E-STOP + live status)

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Robot controller IP on the robot LAN

variables.name: GO2_DDS_ADDRESS
variables.description: This device's own IP on the robot LAN that CycloneDDS binds to (the onboard Jetson is normally 192.168.123.18). Must be non-empty.

variables.name: CMD_VX
variables.description: Forward walk speed command in m/s (0 = trot in place; range about -0.6..0.6)
